case_title: RANDALL SCHILLER PRODUCTIONS VS. DAN CALLEN

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE $70.00) SERVED FEB-07-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CALLEN, DAN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-26-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-26-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RANDALL SCHILLER PRODUCTIONS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CALLEN, DAN $670.03 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $770.03 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF RANDALL SCHILLER PRODUCTIONS AS TO DEFENDANT CALLEN, DAN
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $670.03 FILED BY RANDALL SCHILLER PRODUCTIONS AS TO DEFENDANT CALLEN, DAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-13-2014 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF RANDALL SCHILLER PRODUCTIONS
TRIAL RESET TO MAR-26-2014 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF FEB-13-2014 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-26-2014 - JUDGMENT.

RETURN MAIL RE: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ENVELOPE MARKED: RETURN TO SENDER - REFUSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD ("DAN CALLEN HAS NEVER LIVED AT THIS ADDRESS. NOR DO WE KNOW WHERE HE IS"). ENVELOPE WAS OPENED, AND RESEALED. AS TO DEFENDANT CALLEN, DAN
